messages.content: 以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：通过观察图 20(b)、(c)、(d)，发现缺口损伤都会导致其存在的叶片高度范围的激波位置明显向叶片前缘移动，使气流提前与叶片表面发生分离。此外发生在不同叶片高度的缺口损伤会对激波后分离涡结构以及气流流动方向产生不同的影响。叶片前缘顶部发生缺口会导致激波后径向分离涡的弦向范围最远扩大至80%叶片弦长位置，同时径向分离涡的强度也会增大，并且在叶顶区域激波后，气流的流动方向会发生改变，产生新的脱落涡，加剧叶顶 10%叶片高度的出口堵塞程度。叶片前缘中部发生缺口会使激波后的流线弯曲程度更大，这表明 70%-50%叶片高度位置激波后分离涡的强度明显增大了，形成了严重的回流涡核结构，加剧了气流流动损失。叶片前缘根部发生缺口对于原叶片的流场结构的影响程度要弱于另外两种缺口损伤叶片，但会提高角区位置脱落涡的攀升高度，加大了叶片根部出口流动堵塞程度，从而降低了压气机的气动性能。

By observing Figures 20(b), (c), and (d), it is found that gap damages would significantly shift the shock wave position at the height range of the existing blades towards the leading edge, causing premature separation of the flow from the blade surface. Additionally, gap damages occurring at different blade heights would have different effects on the shock wave separation vortex structure and flow direction. A gap at the top of the leading edge would lead to the farthest expansion of the radial separation vortex aft of the shock wave to the 80% chord length position of the blade. Furthermore, the strength of the radial separation vortex would increase, and the flow direction would change after the shock wave at the blade top region, resulting in the generation of new shedding vortices and exacerbating the blockage degree of the outlet at the 10% blade height. A gap occurring at the middle of the leading edge would cause a greater curvature of the streamlines after the shock wave, indicating a significant increase in the intensity of the separation vortex between 70% and 50% blade heights, leading to a severe recirculating vortex core structure and exacerbating the flow loss. A gap at the root of the leading edge would have a weaker impact on the flow field structure of the original blade compared to the other two gap damages. However, it would increase the ascent height of the vortex in the corner region and enhance the blockage degree of the flow at the root of the blade, thereby reducing the aerodynamic performance of the compressor.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：为探究不同叶片高度的缺口损伤造成压气机稳定裕度大幅减小的原因，图21展示了正常叶片和损伤叶片在近失速流量点的叶片吸力面静压系数和极限流线分布。当转子叶片流量从设计流量点减小到近失速点时，叶片表面的激波位置会向叶片前缘移动，相应的气流也会提前在叶片表面发生分离，激波后气流的流线弯曲曲率更大，相应的分离涡强度也会增强。气流分离线与激波近似重合，这与图20的现象一致。近失速点流量下，由于更高的气流速度会引起更强的离心力作用，所以导致叶片通道内的压力梯度和离心力更加不匹配，压气机的流场结构也变得更为复杂，叶片发生缺口所造成的分离涡强度相比与设计流量点会进一步加强，形成更大范围的流动堵塞区，造成压气机的失速，使压气机的稳定裕度大幅降低

In order to investigate the reasons for the significant reduction in stability margin of the compressor caused by gap damages at different blade heights, Figure 21 shows the distribution of blade suction surface static pressure coefficient and limit streamlines for both normal and damaged blades at the near-stall flow point. As the flow rate of the rotor blade decreases from the design flow rate to the near-stall point, the shock wave position on the blade surface will shift towards the leading edge, and the corresponding flow will separate prematurely on the blade surface. The curvature of the streamlines after the shock wave on the blade surface becomes larger, and the intensity of the separation vortex increases accordingly. The separation line of the airflow approximately coincides with the shock wave, consistent with the phenomenon observed in Figure 20. Under the near-stall flow condition, the higher airflow velocity causes a stronger centrifugal force, resulting in a mismatch between the pressure gradient and the centrifugal force within the blade passage. The flow field structure of the compressor becomes more complex, and the intensity of the separation vortex caused by the gap damage of the blade is further intensified compared to the design flow rate. This leads to a greater extent of flow blockage, causing the compressor to stall and significantly reducing the stability margin of the compressor.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：当转子叶片流量从设计流量点减小到近失速点时，叶片表面的激波位置会向叶片前缘移动，导致气流也会提前与叶片表面发生分离

As the flow rate of the rotor blade decreases from the design flow rate to the near-stall point, the shock wave position on the blade surface will shift towards the leading edge, causing the flow to separate prematurely from the blade surface.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：图 21(b)给出了叶片前缘顶部发生缺口时近失速点的叶片吸力面极限流线分布，相较于正常叶片近失速点的叶片吸力面极限流线分布情况，叶片前缘顶部发生缺口后会使激波后的径向分离涡最大曲率位置向叶顶区域移动，加剧叶顶区域的径向涡强度，造成叶顶区域更严重的流体堵塞

Figure 21(b) presents the distribution of limit streamlines on the suction surface of the blade at the near-stall point when a gap occurs at the top of the leading edge. Compared to the distribution of limit streamlines on the suction surface of the normal blade at the near-stall point, the occurrence of a gap at the top of the leading edge will cause the maximum curvature position of the radial separation vortex aft of the shock wave to move towards the blade top region. This intensifies the intensity of the radial vortex in the blade top region, resulting in more severe fluid blockage in the blade top region.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我润色下面这段文字：As shown in Fig. 22, when notching occurs at the tip of the leading edge of the blade, the pressure difference between the suction side and the pressure side of the blade before 40% of the chord length of the blade increases significantly compared to a normal blade, and the fluid at the tip of the blade under the action of the larger pressure difference increases the degree of leakage from the pressure side to the suction side, forming a more serious vortex of leakage at the tip of the blade.

As depicted in Figure 22, when notching occurs at the tip of the leading edge of the blade, there is a notable increase in the pressure difference between the suction side and the pressure side of the blade before 40% of the chord length, compared to a normal blade. Consequently, under the influence of the greater pressure difference, the fluid at the blade tip experiences an increased degree of leakage from the pressure side to the suction side. This ultimately leads to the formation of a more severe vortex of leakage at the tip of the blade.

以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我润色下面这段文字：As shown in Figure 23, it was found that the NTLE blade had a higher leakage flow rate through the tip clearance compared to the normal blade (as indicated by the red arrow in Figure 23), and in the area enclosed by the dashed line, approximately 50% of the blade chord length, the leakage vortex structure originating from the tip clearance showed more significant changes.  This location corresponds to the location of the passage shock wave, indicating that there was a stronger interaction between the leakage vortex and the shock wave, resulting in the breakup of the leakage vortex, which caused more severe blockage in the blade passage.  To more intuitively observe the blockage in the tip region of the blade passage, Figure 24 shows the relative Mach number distribution of the normal blade and NTLE blade tip region near the stall point.  According to the relative Mach number distribution of the normal blade passage, when notch damage occurs in the blade tip region, there will be a clear low Mach number flow region behind the passage shock wave in the blade passage. This region corresponds to the location where the leakage vortex and shock wave interact as described in Figure 23. The existence of the low energy fluid region and the blade wake loss region in this channel will cause strong flow blockage and flow loss in the blade tip region, reducing the compressor stability margin

As illustrated in Figure 23, it was observed that the NTLE blade exhibited a higher leakage flow rate through the tip clearance compared to the normal blade (indicated by the red arrow in Figure 23). In the area delineated by the dashed line, which encompasses approximately 50% of the blade chord length, the leakage vortex structure originating from the tip clearance underwent more significant changes. This region corresponds to the location of the passage shock wave, indicating a stronger interaction between the leakage vortex and the shock wave. Consequently, the interaction led to the breakup of the leakage vortex, resulting in more severe blockage within the blade passage.
To provide a more visually comprehensive understanding of the blockage in the tip region of the blade passage, Figure 24 depicts the distribution of relative Mach number in the tip region near the stall point for both the normal blade and the NTLE blade. According to the relative Mach number distribution in the normal blade passage, the presence of notch damage in the blade tip region leads to a distinct low Mach number flow region behind the passage shock wave within the blade passage. This region aligns with the area where the leakage vortex and shock wave interact, as explained in Figure 23. The presence of this low-energy fluid region, combined with the blade wake loss region within the channel, results in significant flow blockage and loss of flow in the blade tip region, consequently reducing the stability margin of the compressor.
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：如图23所示，通过与正常叶片对比发现，NTLE叶片的叶顶间隙泄漏流量更大（如图 23中红色箭头标志处所示），并且在虚线围住的区域，大约叶片的50%弦长，发源于叶顶间隙的泄漏涡结构发生更加明显的变化，此位置正对应通道激波所在位置

As shown in Figure 23, compared to the normal blade, the NTLE blade exhibits a higher leakage flow rate through the tip clearance (indicated by the red arrow in Figure 23). In the region enclosed by the dashed line, approximately 50% of the chord length of the blade, the leakage vortex structure originating from the tip clearance undergoes more significant changes. This location corresponds to the position of the passage shock wave.

As shown in Figure 23, a comparison with the normal blade reveals that the NTLE blade exhibits a higher leakage flow rate through the tip clearance (indicated by the red arrow in Figure 23). Additionally, at approximately 50% of the blade chord length (enclosed by the dashed line), the leakage vortex structure originating from the tip clearance undergoes more pronounced changes. Remarkably, this particular location corresponds to the position of the passage shock wave.

This indicates that there is a stronger interaction between the leakage vortex and the shock wave, leading to the breakup of the leakage vortex and the formation of a large region of low-energy fluid. As a result, more severe blockage occurs within the blade passage. In order to visually observe the blockage within the tip region of the blade passage more clearly,
以SCI的航空航天类的文章标准帮我用英文翻译下面这段文字：正常叶片的中部叶高区域激波后分离涡强度最大，流场结构也最为复杂，相应的流场气动敏感性也更强，所以发生在叶片前缘中部的缺口损伤对其存在的叶高范围流场结构会产生极大的影响。

At the mid-blade region of the normal blade, the intensity of the separation vortex after the shock wave is the highest, and the flow field structure is also more complex. Similarly, the corresponding aerodynamic sensitivity of the flow field is stronger. Therefore, gap damages occurring at the middle of the leading edge of the blade have a significant impact on the flow field structure within the existing height range.
